incident: Old-gen fills up: Full GCs grow longer and reclaim nothing as the invoices cache region balloons, then an OutOfMemoryError (Java heap space) is thrown with a multi-line stack trace, the request returns 503 and the liveness probe fails — amid a recurring report-scheduler distractor. Tests multi-line stack-trace handling + code_refs.

ground_truth.desc: the code frame where it blew up
